hd8295b54g971bg4bf2g85ddg40d44ee48dc8: My head's mashed, guts are burnin'... hope I ain't poisoned.

h12601c64g97afg482cg9784g0b8f07d34a98: Piss off, I've got coin on this game!
h9b260413gb6d0g4c62ga0eag518744ed3163: Hey... hey! You ain't roundin' me up for no raid. No way. I'm DRINKIN'!
h632562cfg1ccdg4158g97a6g969494d1219d: You'll need to sober up before another raid.
he743f16egb804g486dga973g56fc35ecf5bf: Tha's wot I said! Too sozzled for slicin' folks.
hec715f65g364fg4226ga1cbg4d05e0318436: I'd sleep it off in the worg pens... but that place is a madhouse right now.
h02975a96ge4ecg4c48gb4f5g234569a7dccf: Show your brand and tell her to get moving.
